title: coleus pallidus
intro: Coleus pallidus, also known as the Painted Nettle or Pale Coleus, is a perennial plant native to tropical regions of Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus pallidus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Coleus pallidus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
